queue_item.action: Define a Safari-compatible output-timeline evidence contract that distinguishes render progression from human audibility.

progress.finding: Require a monotonic non-zero getOutputTimestamp timeline and treat outputLatency as optional; browser render timing is not proof of human audibility.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files

queue_item.handoff: Vercel Studio should sample getOutputTimestamp at least twice inside the bounded physical-iPhone session, pass the samples through validateAudioOutputTimeline, and retain the separate heard/not_heard human report. Do not require outputLatency on Safari and do not classify render_timeline_observed as audible.

shared_state_policy: Additive queue update only; operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was not overwritten.
